title: Joking + Swight Overlay
description: Combines the textures of Swights and jokingPVP overlays.
body: Combines the sword, particles and GUI of Swights pvp overlay with jokingPVPs potions and maces. Adds clear distinguishable pots and a small but pleasent sword and axe. Adds saturated terrain for better colors and recognition. USE WITH SMALL SHEILD TEXTURE PACK
